item.title: Research Focus
item.description: Dr. Yan’s research focuses on developing engineering solutions to the technical challenges in magnetic resonate imaging and MR-guided focused ultrasound, aiming to improve transmit field and B0 homogeneity, reduce the heating near implants, speed up the acquisition speed, reduce the motion artifacts and boost the imaging quality.

item.title: Item without image
item.description: Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradisematic country, in which roasted parts of sentences fly into your mouth.

item.title: Name of the work 5
item.description: Fifth abundantly made Give sixth hath. Cattle creature i be don’t them.

item.title: Name of the work 6
item.description: Fifth abundantly made Give sixth hath. Cattle creature i be don’t them.

item.title: Name of the work 7
item.description: Fifth abundantly made Give sixth hath. Cattle creature i be don’t them.

item.title: Name of the work 8
item.description: Fifth abundantly made Give sixth hath. Cattle creature i be don’t them.

A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradisematic country, in which roasted parts of sentences fly into your mouth.
